default._ww-text_text: A native HTML5 video player built for WeWeb — with playback controls, events, and workflow actions.
Built with WeWeb design system tokens
Trigger play, pause, and seek actions directly from any workflow. No extra JavaScript needed.
Listen to play, pause, and end events — each exposing the current playback time for rich interactivity.
`Is Playing` and `Current Time` are available as global variables for bindings anywhere on the page.
Fired when the video reaches the end.
Whether the video is currently playing.
Use playVideo / pauseVideo workflow actions instead of relying solely on native controls for richer UX.

interactions.name: Seek Video to 10 Seconds

__SEEK_TO_10__.name: Seek video to 10 seconds
__SEEK_TO_10__.__wwdescription: Trigger the seekTo action on the video player to jump to the 10-second mark

interactions.description: On click: trigger the seekTo action on element 70c507be-d971-451e-b557-2542dd9f455e (ww-video-weweb), passing Time = 10. This jumps playback to the 10-second mark.

default._ww-text_text: Built on the native <video> element for maximum browser compatibility and performance.
Display a custom preview image before playback begins, improving the perceived load experience.
When autoplay is enabled, muted mode is automatically enforced to comply with browser policies.
Fired when playback starts or resumes.
Jump to a specific time in seconds.
Always set an explicit height or aspect ratio so the video fills its container predictably.
When using autoplay, always set muted: true to satisfy browser autoplay restrictions.
Use a poster image to improve perceived performance before the video loads.

interactions.name: Pause Video

__PAUSE_VIDEO__.name: Pause video
__PAUSE_VIDEO__.__wwdescription: Pause playback on the main video player

interactions.description: On click: trigger the pauseVideo action on element 70c507be-d971-451e-b557-2542dd9f455e (ww-video-weweb). This pauses playback.

interactions.name: Play Video on Click

__PLAY_VIDEO__.name: Play video
__PLAY_VIDEO__.__wwdescription: Trigger the playVideo action on the video player element to start or resume playback

interactions.description: On click: trigger the playVideo action on element 70c507be-d971-451e-b557-2542dd9f455e (ww-video-weweb). This starts or resumes playback.
